refactor(cli): remove unused showRowNums field from StyledTable

Remove dead code from the StyledTable struct:
- Remove showRowNums field that was never read
- Remove WithRowNumbers() method that was never called

The row numbering feature was declared but never implemented
or used anywhere in the codebase. This cleanup follows the
principle of deleting unused code rather than keeping it
around for hypothetical future use.
